name: ollama
description: Ollama language model provider for VS Code.

url.title: Ollama URL
url.description: Base URL for the Ollama server.

models.title: Models
models.description: Optional model names to expose from this Ollama server. When omitted, all /api/tags models are exposed.

headers.title: Headers
headers.description: Additional HTTP headers to include with Ollama model discovery and chat requests.

useOpenWebUIProxy.title: Use Open WebUI Proxy
useOpenWebUIProxy.description: Route requests through Open WebUI's Ollama API Proxy (/ollama/ prefix).

openWebUIApiKey.title: Open WebUI API Key
openWebUIApiKey.description: API key for Open WebUI authentication (Bearer token). Required when Use Open WebUI Proxy is enabled.

ollama.endpoint.description: Base URL for the Ollama server. Provider configuration from VS Code takes precedence when present.

ollama.headers.description: Additional HTTP headers to include with Ollama model discovery and chat requests.

ollama.useOpenWebUIProxy.description: Use Open WebUI Ollama API Proxy? When enabled, all requests are routed through Open WebUI's /ollama/ proxy endpoints. Requires an Open WebUI instance running with Ollama backend configured.

ollama.openWebUIApiKey.description: Open WebUI API key (Bearer token). Obtained from Settings > Account in Open WebUI. Required when Use Open WebUI Proxy is enabled.
